heading: Today
text: Scattered to numerous showers north. Periods of sun south, scattered showers, mainly afternoon. Highs in the 60s to near 70 north, in the 70s for the Champlain Valley and south.

heading: Tonight
text: Periods of clouds. A good chance of evening showers north, isolated south, diminishing overnight. Lows in the upper 40s and 50s.

heading: Sunday, Father’s Day
text: Periods of sun, a passing shower south, and a better chance north. Highs in the 60s to near 70 north, in the 70s for the Champlain Valley and south.
